info.description: Backend modular API for GNyx. (Powered by Kubex Ecosystem)
info.title: GNyx API

get.description: Returns members, effective permissions, and role catalog for the active tenant scope.

patch.description: Reassigns the role of a member inside the active tenant scope.

get.description: Returns the pending access queue for the active tenant scope.

patch.description: Approves or rejects a pending access request for the target tenant.

get.description: Redirects the browser to the Google consent screen.
Returns the authenticated user profile plus memberships, team memberships, and access scope.

post.description: Exchanges a valid refresh token for a new access and refresh token pair.
Authenticates a user and returns access and refresh tokens.
Creates a local user with email and password.

get.description: Exchanges the Google authorization code, issues local tokens, and redirects back to the frontend.

post.description: Exports the generated board payloads as a ZIP archive for portability and demo usage.
post.summary: Export a generated BI board bundle

post.description: Generates a grounded BI board plan and dashboard schema for the supported domain slice.

get.description: Returns the status of the grounded Sankhya metadata catalog used by BI generation.
Returns the public runtime configuration used by the frontend.
Returns runtime health plus provider dependency status.
Returns a compact liveness payload for deployment health checks.

post.description: Creates a new invite and sends an invitation email.

get.description: Validates the invite token and retrieves associated invite details.

post.description: Accepts the invite associated with the token and creates a user account.

get.description: Returns the authenticated user profile plus memberships, team memberships, and access scope.
Returns the active provider catalog and health status for the gateway runtime.

post.description: Receives a public onboarding or prospect request and stores it in the pending access queue for manual review.
Revokes the current refresh token and clears auth cookies.

get.description: Performs a lightweight availability check against a configured provider.

post.description: Executes a non-streaming provider request using the active server-side provider registry.
Executes a streaming provider request using Server-Sent Events.
post.summary: Execute a streaming unified AI request
